title: Mock Pooling
author: Opentrons
materials: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: This protocol automates the pooling of...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates the pooling of 20 ul aliquots taken from designated wells of a 2 mL 96-well plate and dispensed into a single tube. Only the rear-most channel of the p300 multichannel pipette is used. To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [Opentrons OT-2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/ot-2) * [Opentrons OT-2 Run App (Version 3.19.0 or later)](https://opentrons.com/ot-app/) * [Opentrons Multi-Channel p300 pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons Tips for the p300 pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) ---

steps.title: Use the parameters below to provide...
steps.instruction: Use the parameters below to provide a list of designated source wells (as a comma-separated string like "A1,B2,C3" with no spaces), provide the row and column location of the pool tube (example "A1"), answer "YES" if using the same tip for pooling and provide well bottom clearance for aspirate and dispense (in mm).

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map below
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map below.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.
